item.title: cloud-hypervisor / cloud-hypervisor
item.description:

item.title: lancedb / lance
item.description:
Desc: Modern columnar data format for ML and LLMs implemented in Rust. Convert from parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, with more integrations coming..
